context: Tests whether the agent writes an idempotent webhook receiver that iterates req.body.data, dedups by event.id, switches on the schema field, and ACKs once per batch with 200.

checklist.name: Iterates req.body.data
checklist.description: Receiver reads the events array from req.body.data (with empty-array fallback) — does NOT treat req.body as a single event

checklist.name: Dedup by event.id
checklist.description: Maintains a Set (or LRU/Map) keyed by event.id at module scope and skips events whose id has been seen

checklist.name: Reads top-level schema
checklist.description: Routes on the value of req.body.schema (or per-event schema) using the includes/contains check on the schema string

checklist.name: Default to processUnknown
checklist.description: Falls through to processUnknown for unrecognized schema strings

checklist.name: Single 200 ACK per batch
checklist.description: Sends res.status(200) (or res.sendStatus(200)) exactly once after processing the entire batch, not per item, and not a non-2xx for partial failure

checklist.name: Idempotency comment
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly notes E&A may retry the same batch and that the receiver is therefore designed to be idempotent

checklist.name: Exports processor stubs
checklist.description: Exports processMessageSent, processReactionCreated, processReactionDeleted, processUnknown as named exports (or attaches them to module.exports for ESM compatibility)
